accent.purpose: Primary action, focus, and current selection. Not decoration.

info.purpose: Live, informational, active run, and service metadata states.

warning.purpose: Skipped, starting, stopping, slow, and compatibility warning states.

destructive.purpose: Failed scenarios, unhealthy services, destructive controls, and hard errors.

bg-primary.purpose: Main app background in light mode.

bg-secondary.purpose: Toolbar, sidebar, cards, tables, buttons, and fields at rest.

log-bg.purpose: Diagnostic log viewer background. Replaces hardcoded black.

headline.purpose: Page-level titles when a screen needs a distinct title.

title.purpose: Panel titles, active run titles, and major detail headings.

label.purpose: Toolbar labels, table headers, state labels, and compact controls.

mono.purpose: Run IDs, service URLs, ports, logs, durations, roles, and protocol values.

shadows.name: interaction-low
shadows.purpose: Sparse hover affordance. Prefer row highlighting for dense lists.

motion.name: state-normal
motion.purpose: Control state changes and focus transitions.

motion.name: progress-fill
motion.purpose: Run progress width changes. Must respect reduced-motion preferences.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Collapse sidebar and stack run progress header/body.

knownDebt.name: Literal log colors
knownDebt.target: Move log colors to tokens and use Log Well and Log Text.

knownDebt.name: Undefined primary color
knownDebt.target: Use --color-accent or add a real token.

knownDebt.name: Card-heavy overview
knownDebt.evidence: SummaryCards and ScenarioGrid dominate the dashboard overview.
knownDebt.target: Use tables, split panes, grouped lists, and failure-first triage views where comparison matters.

knownDebt.name: Modal-first scenario settings
knownDebt.evidence: Toolbar opens settings-modal for scenario parameters.
knownDebt.target: Move configuration toward inline, staged, or inspector-style controls that keep run context visible.

knownDebt.name: Scope ambiguity
knownDebt.evidence: Run All, Start All, Start with PDS2, Stop All, Restart, topology, and runner controls share one toolbar.
knownDebt.target: Group controls by network scope versus run scope and preview what each action affects.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action for starting a scoped run or confirming a run setup.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 28px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(52% 0.18 15); background: oklch(52% 0.18 15); color: oklch(99% 0.003 15); font: 600 12px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.18 15); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: State Badge
components.description: Semantic state label. Always includes readable text, not color alone.
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid oklch(60% 0.18 145); background: oklch(60% 0.18 145 / 0.08); color: oklch(60% 0.18 145); font: 600 11px/1.2 'SF Mono', Menlo, Monaco, monospace; }

components.name: Run Progress Panel
components.description: Signature live component showing run state, elapsed time, scenario counts, current scenario, freshness, and mode badges.
components.css: .ds-run-progress { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(60% 0.15 210); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(99% 0.003 15); color: oklch(13% 0.005 200); } .ds-run-progress span { display: block; font: 600 12px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-run-progress strong { font: 700 19px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }

components.name: Log Viewer
components.description: Copyable diagnostic output surface using tokenized dark neutrals and monospace type.
components.css: .ds-log-viewer { max-height: 400px; overflow: auto; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(32% 0.005 200); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(12% 0.005 200); color: oklch(80% 0.01 200); font: 400 11px/1.5 'SF Mono', Menlo, Monaco, monospace; white-space: pre-wrap; }
